creator: arsptr@internode.on.net
text:
No I don't approve of this patch.

RUBY_WITH_SUFFIX cannot be removed from SUB_LIST as a simple grep  
will reveal.

Also, why is USE_LDCONFIG needed? There are no shared libraries in  
this port.


On 27/09/2006, at 3:20 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of www/instiki,
>
> Please note that PR ports/103705 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103705
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
